entity.label: Ziddim
entity.subtitle: Place
entity.description: Sides, a town of Naphtali (Josh. 19:35), has been identified with Kefr-Hattin, the “village of the Hittites,” about 5 miles west of Tiberias.

nodes.label: Ziddim
nodes.description: Sides, a town of Naphtali (Josh. 19:35), has been identified with Kefr-Hattin, the “village of the Hittites,” about 5 miles west of Tiberias.

verses.text: And the fenced cities are Ziddim, Zer, and Hammath, Rakkath, and Chinnereth,
